docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON,JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SHARABY,JASMINE DBA CA.MINI BUS&DOOR-DOOR EXPRESS SHARABY,ERIC DBA CA MINI BUS&DOOR-DOOR EXPRESS CALIFORNIA MINI BUS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
